'''thazhosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osetrova|osetrova]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osetrova|osetrova]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazhosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzhesheth|thæzhesheth]] || [[word:thæzheshej|thæzheshej]] || [[word:thæzheshesh|thæzheshesh]] || [[word:thæzheshe|thæzheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhozhoshoth|thazhozhoshoth]] || [[word:thazhozhoshoj|thazhozhoshoj]] || [[word:thazhozhoshosh|thazhozhoshosh]] || [[word:thazhozhosho|thazhozhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhoshoth|thazhoshoth]] || [[word:thazhoshoj|thazhoshoj]] || [[word:thazhoshosh|thazhoshosh]] || [[word:thazhosho|thazhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhofshofth|thazhofshofth]] || [[word:thazhofshofj|thazhofshofj]] || [[word:thazhofshofsh|thazhofshofsh]] || [[word:thazhofshof|thazhofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhoshotho|thazhoshotho]] || [[word:thazhoshojo|thazhoshojo]] || [[word:thazhoshosho|thazhoshosho]] || [[word:thazhoshoko|thazhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhoshoth|thazhoshoth]] || [[word:thazhoshoj|thazhoshoj]] || [[word:thazhoshosh|thazhoshosh]] || [[word:thazhosho|thazhosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhoshothol|thazhoshothol]] || [[word:thazhoshojol|thazhoshojol]] || [[word:thazhoshoshol|thazhoshoshol]] || [[word:thazhoshokol|thazhoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhoshoothotho|thazhoshoothotho]] || [[word:thazhoshoojojo|thazhoshoojojo]] || [[word:thazhoshooshosho|thazhoshooshosho]] || [[word:thazhoshooko|thazhoshooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhoshothon|thazhoshothon]] || [[word:thazhoshojon|thazhoshojon]] || [[word:thazhoshoshon|thazhoshoshon]] || [[word:thazhoshokon|thazhoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhoshothooro|thazhoshothooro]] || [[word:thazhoshojooro|thazhoshojooro]] || [[word:thazhoshoshooro|thazhoshoshooro]] || [[word:thazhoshokooro|thazhoshokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
